title: secretx-doppler: implement Doppler backend
description: Implement SecretStore for Doppler via its REST API (https://api.doppler.com/v3). URI: secretx://doppler/<project>/<config>/<secret-name>. Auth via DOPPLER_TOKEN env var (preferred) or ?token= query param; never put tokens in stored URIs. get() fetches from API; cache via secretx-cache is required in practice due to aggressive Doppler rate limits on per-secret fetch. put() calls secrets update API. refresh() bypasses cache. No official Rust SDK; use reqwest for HTTP. Dep: secretx-core, secretx-cache, reqwest.
